text: Investigation 2026-07-02: verified with all 4 backend pkgs installed. Only working quiet recipe TODAY: suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(amatrix)) (optionally + options(amatrix.optional_backends=FALSE) to prevent dispatch-time registration). Root cause: .onAttach (R/zzz.R:63-92) gates only on system.file() + probe policy and IGNORES amatrix.optional_backends and amatrix.disable_* options — users who disabled backends still get the note (arguably a bug). No master switch (no amatrix.backend='cpu', no AMATRIX_QUIET). Default behavior is already CPU-only (strict+auto -> cpu, policy.R:9-14); complaint is purely message noise. Fix: make .onAttach respect the disable options; add amatrix.quiet_startup option and/or AMATRIX_QUIET env; document in README + ?amatrix_use_gpu.
